blocks.text: Suzuka on Friday — and Hovland hunts Houston form
🏎️ Fri 03:30 — Japanese GP at Suzuka, Russell leads Antonelli by just 4 points
Hovland finished T90 at Valspar — his worst result in months. Houston Open tees off Thursday, a critical confidence reset before Augusta. Reitan and Ventura also need a stronger week.
🚴 Fri 11:52 — E3 Saxo Classic, Abrahamsen and Hoelgaard on punchy Belgian cobbles
🚴 Sun 11:00 — Gent-Wevelgem, Wærenskjold Norway's best shot at Spring Classic glory
